Text.Page:
If you're going to fraternize with the pirates, you need to do it right.

You need to talk and act like them if you expect to get any respect—by which I mean cooperation.

Convince {@LinkCreature:211#1036$$Dilato} and {@LinkCreature:62#1014$$Finn} that you're interested in being a pirate, and you'll have access to all kinds of information.

Nowadays it seems like everyone thinks they can just walk up and be a pirate! You think an eye patch and a funny bird are all it takes?

Tell you what—answer this question and we'll see if you've got the heart of a pirate.

When does a pirate start drinking rum?
Aye, that's about the time! You might just have a pirate's heart yet!
Indeed! Now that's an answer I can get behind! Cheers to the wee ones and their rum-soaked little hearts.

You look a little...hmm. You sure you're cut out for a pirate's life?

Well, let's see what you've got.

What's the most exciting part of being a pirate?
Ah, yes...I enjoy a pocket full of change myself! Well said, friend. I'll drink to that!
The calm comfort of the water. Aye, that's something I enjoy myself. Well said.
A real pirate's pirate! That's what you are!
Ha! Let's drink to drinking! That's definitely something worth drinking to. You may just be cut out for this after all.

Good job! Being recognized by the pirates is not an easy task.

Just do a few favors for them, and it won't be long before they take you in fully.
